metadata_fields.recommended_access: Default publish access for a template: public, password, or password_ask_info. Public:true operations are website-callable; for password templates they are still intended to run behind the protected website gate.
metadata_fields.data_sensitivity: Human-readable sensitivity label used by agents to avoid publishing private workflows as open public apps.

templates.title: Waitlist
templates.description: Collect visitor emails and let agents qualify or contact leads.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS leads (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, email TEXT NOT NULL, name TEXT, note TEXT, stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', source TEXT, visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_stage_created ON leads(stage, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_leads_email ON leads(email);

submit_lead.sql: INSERT INTO leads (id, email, name, note, source, visitor_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

advance_lead.sql: UPDATE leads SET stage = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

sample_frontend_calls: fetch('/_revdoku/app/submit_lead', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ email, name }) })

templates.title: Leaderboard
templates.description: Accept player scores and show a ranked list.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS scores (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, player TEXT NOT NULL, score INTEGER NOT NULL, visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_scores_rank ON scores(score DESC, created_at ASC);

list_scores.sql: SELECT id, player, score, created_at FROM scores ORDER BY score DESC, created_at ASC LIMIT 50

submit_score.sql: INSERT INTO scores (id, player, score, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

adjust_score.sql: UPDATE scores SET score = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Voting
templates.description: Let visitors vote once per item and let agents moderate items.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vote_items (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS votes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, item_id TEXT NOT NULL, visitor_key TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(item_id, visitor_key));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_vote_items_status ON vote_items(status, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_votes_item ON votes(item_id);
seed: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO vote_items (id, title, status, created_at) VALUES ('starter', 'Starter idea', 'approved', datetime('now'));

list_items.sql: SELECT vote_items.id, vote_items.title, COUNT(votes.id) AS votes FROM vote_items LEFT JOIN votes ON votes.item_id = vote_items.id WHERE vote_items.status = 'approved' GROUP BY vote_items.id ORDER BY votes DESC, vote_items.created_at DESC LIMIT 100

vote.sql: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO votes (id, item_id, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)

approve_item.sql: UPDATE vote_items SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Link Feed
templates.description: Collect useful links, approve submissions, and publish a feed.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS links (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, url TEXT NOT NULL, summary TEXT, tag TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending', created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_links_status_created ON links(status, created_at DESC);

list_links.sql: SELECT id, title, url, summary, tag, created_at FROM links WHERE status = 'approved' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

submit_link.sql: INSERT INTO links (id, title, url, summary, tag, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

approve_link.sql: UPDATE links SET status = 'approved' WHERE id = ?

templates.title: CRM Board
templates.description: Track opportunities on stages such as new, qualified, contacted, won.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS opportunities (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, company TEXT NOT NULL, contact TEXT, email TEXT, value INTEGER, stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', notes TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_opportunities_stage ON opportunities(stage, updated_at DESC);

list_opportunities.sql: SELECT id, company, contact, email, value, stage, notes, created_at, updated_at FROM opportunities ORDER BY CASE stage WHEN 'new' THEN 1 WHEN 'qualified' THEN 2 WHEN 'contacted' THEN 3 WHEN 'won' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, updated_at DESC LIMIT 200

submit_opportunity.sql: INSERT INTO opportunities (id, company, contact, email, value, notes, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

move_opportunity.sql: UPDATE opportunities SET stage = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

archive_opportunity.sql: UPDATE opportunities SET stage = 'archived', updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Changelog
templates.description: Publish release notes while agents draft private entries.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS changelog_entries (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, version TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', published_at TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_changelog_status_published ON changelog_entries(status, published_at DESC);

list_changes.sql: SELECT id, title, body, version, published_at FROM changelog_entries WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 50

publish_change.sql: UPDATE changelog_entries SET status = 'published', published_at = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

archive_change.sql: UPDATE changelog_entries SET status = 'archived', updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Research Database
templates.description: Store sourced research rows and publish approved findings.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS research_items (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, url TEXT, summary TEXT NOT NULL, source TEXT, confidence INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 3, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_research_status_confidence ON research_items(status, confidence DESC, updated_at DESC);

list_research.sql: SELECT id, title, url, summary, source, confidence, updated_at FROM research_items WHERE status = 'published' ORDER BY confidence DESC, updated_at DESC LIMIT 100

mark_research_published.sql: UPDATE research_items SET status = 'published', updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

score_research.sql: UPDATE research_items SET confidence = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Internal Dashboard
templates.description: Store metrics snapshots and expose read-only dashboard data.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS metrics (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, metric_key TEXT NOT NULL, metric_value REAL NOT NULL, label TEXT, captured_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_metrics_key_time ON metrics(metric_key, captured_at DESC);

latest_metrics.sql: SELECT metric_key, metric_value, label, MAX(captured_at) AS captured_at FROM metrics GROUP BY metric_key ORDER BY metric_key ASC

add_metric.sql: INSERT INTO metrics (id, metric_key, metric_value, label, captured_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

templates.title: Feedback Dashboard
templates.description: Visitors submit ideas, vote once each, and see ideas ranked by votes. The owner is notified about every new submission via the reserved _revdoku_events outbox (written by an AFTER INSERT trigger, so the single public submit action stays one statement).
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ideas (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published', visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS idea_votes (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, idea_id TEXT NOT NULL, visitor_key TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, UNIQUE(idea_id, visitor_key));
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_ideas_status_created ON ideas(status, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_idea_votes_idea ON idea_votes(idea_id);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_idea AFTER INSERT ON ideas BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'idea', 'New idea: ' || substr(NEW.title, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;
seed: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO ideas (id, title, body, status, created_at) VALUES ('welcome', 'What should we build next?', 'Submit your idea and upvote the ones you like.', 'published', datetime('now'));

list_ideas.sql: SELECT ideas.id, ideas.title, ideas.body, ideas.created_at, COUNT(idea_votes.id) AS votes FROM ideas LEFT JOIN idea_votes ON idea_votes.idea_id = ideas.id WHERE ideas.status = 'published' GROUP BY ideas.id ORDER BY votes DESC, ideas.created_at DESC LIMIT 200

submit_idea.sql: INSERT INTO ideas (id, title, body, status, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, 'published', ?, ?)

vote.sql: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO idea_votes (id, idea_id, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)

hide_idea.sql: UPDATE ideas SET status = 'hidden' WHERE id = ?

sample_frontend_calls: fetch('/_revdoku/app/submit_idea', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ title, body, cf_turnstile_token }) })
fetch('/_revdoku/app/vote', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ idea_id }) })

templates.title: Support Center
templates.description: Searchable help articles and snippets with logged searches (for analysis) and type-ahead suggestions driven by popular past searches. Portable search via a STORED generated lowercase column + LIKE (works on Cloudflare D1 and local SQLite; for very large corpora switch to an FTS5 virtual table). Articles are authored by the owner/agent through the private upsert action.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS articles (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', tags TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', slug TEXT, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'published', search_text TEXT GENERATED ALWAYS AS (lower(title || ' ' || body || ' ' || tags)) STORED, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS search_log (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, query TEXT NOT NULL, normalized_query TEXT NOT NULL, results_count INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_articles_status ON articles(status, updated_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_search_log_normalized ON search_log(normalized_query);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_search_log_created ON search_log(created_at DESC);

search_articles.sql: SELECT id, title, substr(body, 1, 300) AS snippet, tags, slug, updated_at FROM articles WHERE status = 'published' AND search_text LIKE '%' || lower(?) || '%' ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 25

suggest.sql: SELECT normalized_query AS suggestion, COUNT(*) AS uses FROM search_log WHERE normalized_query LIKE lower(?) || '%' GROUP BY normalized_query ORDER BY uses DESC, MAX(created_at) DESC LIMIT 8

log_search.sql: INSERT INTO search_log (id, query, normalized_query, results_count, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, lower(?), ?, ?, ?)

upsert_article.sql: INSERT INTO articles (id, title, body, tags, slug, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET title = excluded.title, body = excluded.body, tags = excluded.tags, slug = excluded.slug, status = excluded.status, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

search_analytics.sql: SELECT normalized_query, COUNT(*) AS searches, SUM(CASE WHEN results_count = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS zero_result_searches, MAX(created_at) AS last_searched_at FROM search_log GROUP BY normalized_query ORDER BY searches DESC LIMIT 100

sample_frontend_calls: fetch('/_revdoku/app/log_search', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ query: q, results_count: n }) })

templates.title: Contact Form Inbox
templates.description: Public contact form with private owner inbox actions and owner notifications for every new message.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS contact_messages (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, subject TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', message TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', priority TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'normal', visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, reviewed_at TEXT);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_contact_messages_status_created ON contact_messages(status, created_at DESC);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_contact_message AFTER INSERT ON contact_messages BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'contact_message', 'New contact: ' || substr(NEW.subject, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;

submit_message.sql: INSERT INTO contact_messages (id, name, email, subject, message, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

list_messages.sql: SELECT id, name, email, subject, message, status, priority, created_at, reviewed_at FROM contact_messages WHERE status != 'archived' ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'new' THEN 1 WHEN 'reviewed' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 200

update_message_status.sql: UPDATE contact_messages SET status = ?, priority = ?, reviewed_at = ? WHERE id = ?

sample_frontend_calls: fetch('/_revdoku/app/submit_message', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify({ name, email, subject, message, cf_turnstile_token }) })

templates.title: Quote Requests
templates.description: Public estimate-request form for agencies, consultants, and service businesses, with private status tracking.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS quote_requests (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, company TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', project_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', budget TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', timeline TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', details TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_quote_requests_status_created ON quote_requests(status, created_at DESC);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_quote_request AFTER INSERT ON quote_requests BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'quote_request', 'New quote request: ' || substr(NEW.name || ' - ' || NEW.project_type, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;

submit_quote_request.sql: INSERT INTO quote_requests (id, name, email, company, project_type, budget, timeline, details, visitor_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

list_quote_requests.sql: SELECT id, name, email, company, project_type, budget, timeline, details, status, created_at, updated_at FROM quote_requests ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'new' THEN 1 WHEN 'reviewing' THEN 2 WHEN 'quoted' THEN 3 WHEN 'won' THEN 4 ELSE 5 END, created_at DESC LIMIT 200

update_quote_status.sql: UPDATE quote_requests SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Booking Requests
templates.description: Public appointment or consultation request form with private scheduling status updates.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS booking_requests (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, phone TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', service TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', preferred_date TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', preferred_time TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', notes TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'requested', visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_booking_requests_status_date ON booking_requests(status, preferred_date, created_at DESC);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_booking_request AFTER INSERT ON booking_requests BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'booking_request', 'New booking request: ' || substr(NEW.name || ' - ' || NEW.service, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;

submit_booking_request.sql: INSERT INTO booking_requests (id, name, email, phone, service, preferred_date, preferred_time, notes, visitor_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

list_booking_requests.sql: SELECT id, name, email, phone, service, preferred_date, preferred_time, notes, status, created_at, updated_at FROM booking_requests ORDER BY CASE status WHEN 'requested' THEN 1 WHEN 'confirmed' THEN 2 WHEN 'completed' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, preferred_date ASC, created_at DESC LIMIT 200

update_booking_status.sql: UPDATE booking_requests SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Job Board + Applications
templates.description: Public job listings with application submission, plus private applicant review actions.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS jobs (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, location TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', employment_type TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', description TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'open', created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS applications (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, job_id TEXT NOT NULL, applicant_name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, portfolio_url TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', cover_note TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_jobs_status_created ON jobs(status, created_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_applications_job_status ON applications(job_id, status, created_at DESC);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_application AFTER INSERT ON applications BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'application', 'New application: ' || substr(NEW.applicant_name, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;

list_jobs.sql: SELECT id, title, location, employment_type, description, created_at FROM jobs WHERE status = 'open' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

submit_application.sql: INSERT INTO applications (id, job_id, applicant_name, email, portfolio_url, cover_note, visitor_key, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

upsert_job.sql: INSERT INTO jobs (id, title, location, employment_type, description, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET title = excluded.title, location = excluded.location, employment_type = excluded.employment_type, description = excluded.description, status = excluded.status, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

update_application_status.sql: UPDATE applications SET status = ?, updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?

templates.title: Customer Project Portal
templates.description: Password-protected client portal with project updates, milestones, and client comments.
schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_updates (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', kind TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'update', status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'visible', published_at TEXT NOT NULL, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, updated_at TEXT NOT NULL);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS project_comments (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, update_id TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', author TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '', body TEXT NOT NULL, visitor_key TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _revdoku_events (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, kind TEXT, summary TEXT, created_at TEXT NOT NULL, notified_at TEXT);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_project_updates_status_published ON project_updates(status, published_at DESC);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_project_comments_update ON project_comments(update_id, created_at DESC);

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS notify_new_project_comment AFTER INSERT ON project_comments BEGIN INSERT INTO _revdoku_events (id, kind, summary, created_at) VALUES (lower(hex(randomblob(16))), 'project_comment', 'New portal comment: ' || substr(NEW.author, 1, 80), NEW.created_at); END;

list_updates.sql: SELECT id, title, body, kind, published_at, updated_at FROM project_updates WHERE status = 'visible' ORDER BY published_at DESC LIMIT 100

list_comments.sql: SELECT id, update_id, author, body, created_at FROM project_comments ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100

add_client_comment.sql: INSERT INTO project_comments (id, update_id, author, email, body, visitor_key, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)

upsert_update.sql: INSERT INTO project_updates (id, title, body, kind, status, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT(id) DO UPDATE SET title = excluded.title, body = excluded.body, kind = excluded.kind, status = excluded.status, published_at = excluded.published_at, updated_at = excluded.updated_at

hide_update.sql: UPDATE project_updates SET status = 'hidden', updated_at = ? WHERE id = ?
